bead.title: docs: align API-001 execute-bead status contract
bead.description:
PROBLEM
API-001 documents only five supervisor-visible execute-bead statuses, but the implementation exposes a larger stable status contract used by `ddx try`, `ddx work`, retry logic, review outcomes, land conflict handling, and resource exhaustion. A worker or server consumer that follows API-001 literally will miss valid statuses.

ROOT CAUSE
- docs/helix/02-design/contracts/API-001-execute-bead-supervisor-contract.md:177 lists only `structural_validation_failed`, `execution_failed`, `post_run_check_failed`, `land_conflict`, and `success`.
- cli/internal/agent/execute_bead_status.go:330 defines additional stable statuses including `ratchet_failed`, `push_failed`, `push_conflict`, `preserved_needs_review`, `no_evidence_produced`, `no_changes`, `already_satisfied`, `resource_exhausted`, review statuses, conflict-resolution statuses, and repair-cycle statuses.
- docs/helix/01-frame/features/FEAT-010-task-execution.md already describes richer candidate-cycle and drain lifecycle semantics, so API-001 is stale rather than the implementation being obviously wrong.

PROPOSED FIX
Update API-001 to define the full supervisor-visible status taxonomy or explicitly delegate the canonical list to FEAT-010 plus the implementation enum. Add a compact status table with close/unclaim/operator-attention behavior categories and note which statuses are legacy/future-only if any are not emitted today.

NON-SCOPE
Do not change status strings or worker behavior. Do not redo landing semantics; ddx-693d504f covers that separately.
bead.acceptance:
1. docs/helix/02-design/contracts/API-001-execute-bead-supervisor-contract.md contains a status table or canonical delegation that covers every `ExecuteBeadStatus*` constant in cli/internal/agent/execute_bead_status.go.
2. Any API-001 text that still lists only five statuses is removed or explicitly scoped as a historical minimal v1 subset.
3. `rg -n "status.*one of|structural_validation_failed.*execution_failed.*post_run_check_failed" docs/helix/02-design/contracts/API-001-execute-bead-supervisor-contract.md` has no stale five-status-only contract hit.
4. `cd cli && go test ./internal/agent/... -run TestExecuteBeadStatus` passes.
5. `lefthook run pre-commit` passes.
